case_title: PATRICK PAK HIM YU VS. BRANDON MICHAEL THORNTON

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, PATRICK PAK HIM AS TO DEFENDANT THORNTON, BRANDON MICHAEL
ORDER CASE DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $796.26 FILED BY YU, PATRICK PAK HIM AS TO DEFENDANT THORNTON, BRANDON MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-14-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PATRICK PAK HIM YU. DEFENDANT BRANDON MICHAEL THORNTON DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
